name: node-to-regex-range
title: node-to-regex-range
summary: returns a regex-compatible range from two numbers, min and max
description:
returns a regex-compatible range from two numbers, min and max
It comes with 855,412 generated unit tests to validate it's accuracy! Useful
for creating regular expressions to validate numbers, ranges, years, etc.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-to-regex-range because returns a regex-compatible range from two numbers, min and max.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-to-regex-range as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-to-regex-range with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-to-regex-range --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
